Details:
Removal percentages ranged from 55% to 88% for simazine for PAC dosage ranging from 5 to 13 mg/L, depending on PAC type and contact time.  [1424, 1428, 1431] 
Removal percentages ranged from 80% to 90% for deethylsimazine for PAC dosage of 10 mg/L, depending on PAC type. [1428] 
The use of PAC technology to treat simazine contaminated water supplies has several advantages over the other technologies, including the following: (1) No oxidation byproducts are formed with PAC, (2) the ease of PAC application and dosage control; and (3) the current use of PAC in many plants for taste and odor control during the same months that herbicide contamination tends to be most severe (i.e., late spring and early summer). [1424]
